name: linkedin_company_scraper
title: LinkedIn Company Scraper
description: Scrape public LinkedIn company profile data from a slug or company URL, including name, description, website, industry, company size, headquarters, type, follower count, logo, and recent public posts.

seo.title: LinkedIn Company Scraper Tool for Public Company Profiles
seo.description: Scrape public LinkedIn company profile data with Better Fetch, including name, description, website, industry, company size, headquarters, type, followers, logo, and recent posts.
seo.intro: LinkedIn Company Scraper turns a public LinkedIn company URL into a structured profile record. The tool reads the logged-out company page, normalizes the about section, pulls visible follower and logo metadata, and includes recent public company posts when LinkedIn publishes them in page-level structured data.

useCases.title: B2B lead enrichment
useCases.description: Enrich company records with LinkedIn profile URLs, industry, website, company size, headquarters, description, logo, and follower counts.

useCases.title: Market mapping
useCases.description: Compare public LinkedIn company positioning, industries, sizes, headquarters, and recent post themes across competitors or prospect lists.

useCases.title: Account research
useCases.description: Give sales, recruiting, or research agents a concise public company snapshot before they decide whether to crawl websites or run deeper tools.

faqs.question: Does LinkedIn Company Scraper require cookies?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 reads the public logged-out LinkedIn company page and does not use passwords, exported sessions, private cookies, or private LinkedIn API tokens.

faqs.question: Can it scrape employee lists?
faqs.answer: No. This version returns company profile metadata and recent public company posts when visible. Employee lists and deep enrichment should be added as separate validated tools.

faqs.question: Why are some company fields missing?
faqs.answer: The tool only returns fields present on the public company page. If LinkedIn hides a website, size, headquarters, or post list, the tool does not guess those values.

company_url.description: Public LinkedIn company URL. Use company_url or slug.

slug.description: LinkedIn company slug, such as openai. Use company_url or slug.

max_recent_posts.description: Maximum recent public company posts to return.

recent_posts.description: Recent public company posts from LinkedIn structured data
